title: GitHub - veracium-ai/Veracium: Provenance-aware memory for AI agents.
excerpt: Provenance-aware memory for AI agents. Contribute to veracium-ai/Veracium development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
Veracium is a provenance-aware memory plug-in for agentic systems — durable, per-user memory that resists the injection and confabulation failures that plague naive agent memory. It remembers facts about the user, past interactions, and what worked, with provenance on every fact.

Veracium is the production distillation of an evaluation-driven research project (agent-memory): every design choice below traces to a measured finding, and the research's synthetic-corpus harness is reused as the regression suite.

Why it's shaped this way

  • Typed graph + dated episodes are the store of record. Entity facts live as relational edges (with unforgeable provenance); interaction history lives as dated episodes. A curated "wiki" view is compiled from them and cached — never the source of truth. (The layered design won on both short and 9-week horizons; flat stores each failed one regime.)
  • Supersession, never erasure. Functional facts (preference, employer, deadline) keep one current value with the prior value retained as history — "what did X used to be?" stays answerable. (The category commercial memory systems handle worst; Veracium's strongest.)
  • Representation is a security control. Third-party claims (received email, external docs) are quarantined structurally — stored as third_party_claim edges with the claimant as subject, never as user facts. Content-type quarantine catches obligation/debt/renewal claims regardless of how plausible they look. (Held against a full plausibility ladder incl. contact-impersonation.)
  • Bring your own model. Veracium never owns your API keys or model choice; it calls a Complete callable you supply. A reference Anthropic provider ships in the box.
  • Embedded by default. Zero external services: one SQLite file. Swap in Neo4j/Postgres later via the Store interface.

Install

pip install "veracium[anthropic]"   # core + the reference LLM provider

Extras: [mcp] adds the MCP server, [dev] adds pytest. The core alone depends only on pydantic. To work from source instead:

git clone https://github.com/veracium-ai/Veracium.git && cd Veracium
pip install -e ".[anthropic,dev]"

Links: docs · veracium.ai · PyPI

Use (library)

from veracium import Memory, EvidenceAuthor
from veracium.llm.anthropic import AnthropicComplete

mem = Memory(llm=AnthropicComplete())   # or pass your own Complete callable

# Remember interactions. `author` is the trust-critical input.
mem.remember("alice", "USER: I'm vegetarian and have a dog named Ollie.")
mem.remember("alice", "From billing@scam: you owe $900.",
             author=EvidenceAuthor.THIRD_PARTY, event_type="email")

# Recall grounded, provenance-flagged context for a prompt.
ctx = mem.recall("alice", "suggest a lunch spot")
print(ctx.context)   # states the vegetarian constraint; the $900 "claim" is
                     # rendered under a never-assert flag, not as a fact.

No Anthropic API key? AnthropicComplete is just a convenience — Veracium calls any Complete callable you supply. To run without SDK/key setup, wrap a client you already have; examples/claude_cli_provider.py wraps the claude CLI as a drop-in provider (from claude_cli_provider import ClaudeCLIComplete), and examples/openai_provider.py wraps any OpenAI-compatible chat-completions API (OpenAI itself, vLLM, Ollama's /v1 endpoint) via OpenAIComplete — point it at a local server with OpenAIComplete(base_url=...) and override models with whatever model name your server serves.

Use (MCP)

veracium-mcp exposes remember / recall / answer / maintain tools to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude Desktop/Code, others) with no host-side Python. See docs/mcp.md for the config JSON and tool reference.

Documentation

Hosted docs: veracium-ai.github.io/Veracium

  • examples/demo.ipynb — the scam-email injection demo, runnable end to end (open in Colab).
  • examples/langchain_memory.py — Veracium as the long-term memory layer of a LangChain chat app (session-keyed hybrid: LangChain buffers recent turns, Veracium holds durable facts with provenance and quarantine; your existing LangChain model powers both sides).
  • docs/concepts.md — the mental model: edges vs episodes vs the compiled wiki, provenance & authorship, quarantine, the abstention gate, lifecycle.
  • docs/api.md — the public API: Memory, MemoryConfig, EvidenceAuthor, providing your own LLM callable or store.
  • docs/mcp.md — running and registering the MCP server.
  • docs/design-rationale.md — why there's no update()/delete(), no LLM-free extraction, no TTL purging — and what's genuinely on the roadmap.
  • docs/telemetry.md — the opt-in, anonymous, content-free usage statistics (off by default).
  • docs/diagnostics.md — opt-in error reporting: local-first error log, consented + redacted send.
  • ROADMAP.md · CHANGELOG.md

Status

The validated layered design is implemented, tested (44 offline tests, plus opt-in live tiers: the acceptance eval and a real-corpus robustness harness), and passes its own research-claim bar (5/5, 0 injection asserts). Roadmap v0.1–v0.7 complete, plus opt-in telemetry, a self-check, consented error reporting, and an operation audit log. See ROADMAP.md.

License

MIT

blocks.html_en: Veracium is a provenance-aware memory plug-in for agentic systems — durable, per-user memory that resists the injection and confabulation failures that plague naive agent memory. It remembers facts about the user, past interactions, and what worked, with provenance on every fact.

sentences.en: Veracium is a provenance-aware memory plug-in for agentic systems — durable, per-user memory that resists the injection and confabulation failures that plague naive agent memory.
sentences.zh: Veracium 是一个用于代理系统的来源感知内存插件——持久的、每用户的内存，可以抵抗困扰幼稚代理内存的注入和混淆故障。

sentences.en: It remembers facts about the user, past interactions, and what worked, with provenance on every fact.
sentences.zh: 它会记住有关用户的事实、过去的交互以及有效的方法，并提供每个事实的来源。

blocks.html_en: Veracium is the production distillation of an evaluation-driven research project (agent-memory): every design choice below traces to a measured finding, and the research's synthetic-corpus harness is reused as the regression suite.

sentences.en: Veracium is the production distillation of an evaluation-driven research project (agent-memory): every design choice below traces to a measured finding, and the research's synthetic-corpus harness is reused as the regression suite.
sentences.zh: Veracium 是一个评估驱动的研究项目（代理记忆）的生产提炼：下面的每个设计选择都可以追溯到测量结果，并且该研究的合成语料库工具被重新用作回归套件。

blocks.html_en: Why it's shaped this way

sentences.en: Why it's shaped this way
sentences.zh: 为什么它是这样的形状

blocks.html_en: • Typed graph + dated episodes are the store of record. Entity facts live as relational edges (with unforgeable provenance); interaction history lives as dated episodes. A curated "wiki" view is compiled from them and cached — never the source of truth. (The layered design won on both short and 9-week horizons; flat stores each failed one regime.)

sentences.en: Typed graph + dated episodes are the store of record.
sentences.zh: 键入的图表+注明日期的剧集是记录的存储。

sentences.en: Entity facts live as relational edges (with unforgeable provenance); interaction history lives as dated episodes.
sentences.zh: 实体事实作为关系边缘存在（具有不可伪造的出处）；互动历史就像过时的情节一样存在。

sentences.en: A curated "wiki" view is compiled from them and cached — never the source of truth.
sentences.zh: 精心策划的“wiki”视图是根据它们编译并缓存的——从来都不是事实的来源。

sentences.en: (The layered design won on both short and 9-week horizons; flat stores each failed one regime.)
sentences.zh: （分层设计在短期和 9 周范围内都取得了胜利；扁平化商店都失败了。）

blocks.html_en: • Supersession, never erasure. Functional facts (preference, employer, deadline) keep one current value with the prior value retained as history — "what did X used to be?" stays answerable. (The category commercial memory systems handle worst; Veracium's strongest.)

sentences.en: Supersession, never erasure.
sentences.zh: 取代，永不删除。

sentences.en: Functional facts (preference, employer, deadline) keep one current value with the prior value retained as history — "what did X used to be?"
sentences.zh: 功能性事实（偏好、雇主、截止日期）保留一个当前值，并将之前的值保留为历史——“X 曾经是什么？”

sentences.en: stays answerable.
sentences.zh: 保持负责。

sentences.en: (The category commercial memory systems handle worst; Veracium's strongest.)
sentences.zh: （商业内存系统处理能力最差；Veracium 处理能力最强。）

blocks.html_en: • Representation is a security control. Third-party claims (received email, external docs) are quarantined structurally — stored as third_party_claim edges with the claimant as subject, never as user facts. Content-type quarantine catches obligation/debt/renewal claims regardless of how plausible they look. (Held against a full plausibility ladder incl. contact-impersonation.)

sentences.en: Representation is a security control.
sentences.zh: 表示是一种安全控制。

sentences.en: Third-party claims (received email, external docs) are quarantined structurally — stored as third_party_claim edges with the claimant as subject, never as user facts.
sentences.zh: 第三方声明（收到的电子邮件、外部文档）在结构上被隔离——存储为third_party_claim边缘，以声明者为主题，而不是作为用户事实。

sentences.en: Content-type quarantine catches obligation/debt/renewal claims regardless of how plausible they look.
sentences.zh: 内容类型隔离会捕获义务/债务/续订索赔，无论它们看起来多么合理。

sentences.en: (Held against a full plausibility ladder incl.
sentences.zh: （针对完整的合理性阶梯，包括。

sentences.en: contact-impersonation.)
sentences.zh: 接触-模仿。）

blocks.html_en: • Bring your own model. Veracium never owns your API keys or model choice; it calls a Complete callable you supply. A reference Anthropic provider ships in the box.

sentences.en: Bring your own model.
sentences.zh: 带上你自己的模型。

sentences.en: Veracium never owns your API keys or model choice; it calls a Complete callable you supply.
sentences.zh: Veracium 永远不会拥有您的 API 密钥或型号选择；它调用您提供的完整可调用对象。

sentences.en: A reference Anthropic provider ships in the box.
sentences.zh: 包装盒中附有参考 Anthropic 提供程序。

blocks.html_en: • Embedded by default. Zero external services: one SQLite file. Swap in Neo4j/Postgres later via the Store interface.

sentences.en: Embedded by default.
sentences.zh: 默认嵌入。

sentences.en: Zero external services: one SQLite file.
sentences.zh: 零外部服务：一个 SQLite 文件。

sentences.en: Swap in Neo4j/Postgres later via the Store interface.
sentences.zh: 稍后通过 Store 界面交换 Neo4j/Postgres。

blocks.html_en: The validated layered design is implemented, tested (44 offline tests, plus opt-in live tiers: the acceptance eval and a real-corpus robustness harness), and passes its own research-claim bar (5/5, 0 injection asserts). blocks.html_en: License

content_html_zh:
Veracium 是一个用于代理系统的来源感知内存插件——持久的、每用户的内存，可以抵抗困扰幼稚代理内存的注入和混淆故障。 它会记住有关用户的事实、过去的交互以及有效的方法，并提供每个事实的来源。

Veracium 是一个评估驱动的研究项目（代理记忆）的生产提炼：下面的每个设计选择都可以追溯到测量结果，并且该研究的合成语料库工具被重新用作回归套件。

为什么它是这样的形状

  • 键入的图表+注明日期的剧集是记录的存储。 实体事实作为关系边缘存在（具有不可伪造的出处）；互动历史就像过时的情节一样存在。 精心策划的“wiki”视图是根据它们编译并缓存的——从来都不是事实的来源。 （分层设计在短期和 9 周范围内都取得了胜利；扁平化商店都失败了。）
  • 取代，永不删除。 功能性事实（偏好、雇主、截止日期）保留一个当前值，并将之前的值保留为历史——“X 曾经是什么？” 保持负责。 （商业内存系统处理能力最差；Veracium 处理能力最强。）
  • 表示是一种安全控制。 第三方声明（收到的电子邮件、外部文档）在结构上被隔离——存储为third_party_claim边缘，以声明者为主题，而不是作为用户事实。 内容类型隔离会捕获义务/债务/续订索赔，无论它们看起来多么合理。 （针对完整的合理性阶梯，包括。 接触-模仿。）
  • 带上你自己的模型。 Veracium 永远不会拥有您的 API 密钥或型号选择；它调用您提供的完整可调用对象。 包装盒中附有参考 Anthropic 提供程序。
  • 默认嵌入。 零外部服务：一个 SQLite 文件。 稍后通过 Store 界面交换 Neo4j/Postgres。

安装

pip install "veracium[anthropic]"   # core + the reference LLM provider

附加功能：[mcp] 添加 MCP 服务器，[dev] 添加 pytest。 核心仅依赖于pydantic。 要从源代码开始工作：

git clone https://github.com/veracium-ai/Veracium.git && cd Veracium
pip install -e ".[anthropic,dev]"

链接：文档 · veracium.ai · PyPI

使用（库）

from veracium import Memory, EvidenceAuthor
from veracium.llm.anthropic import AnthropicComplete

mem = Memory(llm=AnthropicComplete())   # or pass your own Complete callable

# Remember interactions. `author` is the trust-critical input.
mem.remember("alice", "USER: I'm vegetarian and have a dog named Ollie.")
mem.remember("alice", "From billing@scam: you owe $900.",
             author=EvidenceAuthor.THIRD_PARTY, event_type="email")

# Recall grounded, provenance-flagged context for a prompt.
ctx = mem.recall("alice", "suggest a lunch spot")
print(ctx.context)   # states the vegetarian constraint; the $900 "claim" is
                     # rendered under a never-assert flag, not as a fact.

没有 Anthropic API 密钥？ AnthropicComplete 只是一种便利 - Veracium 调用您提供的任何 Complete 可调用对象。 要在没有 SDK/密钥设置的情况下运行，请包装您已有的客户端； example/claude_cli_provider.py 将 claude CLI 包装为嵌入式提供程序（from claude_cli_provider import ClaudeCLIComplete），examples/openai_provider.py 通过 OpenAIComplete 包装任何与 OpenAI 兼容的聊天完成 API（OpenAI 本身、vLLM、Ollama 的 /v1 端点）——使用 OpenAIComplete(base_url=...) 将其指向本地服务器 并使用服务器提供的任何模型名称覆盖模型。

使用（MCP）

veracium-mcp 向任何 MCP 兼容代理（Claude Desktop/Code 等）公开记忆/召回/回答/维护工具，无需主机端 Python。 有关配置 JSON 和工具参考，请参阅 docs/mcp.md。

文档

托管文档：veracium-ai.github.io/Veracium

  • example/demo.ipynb — 诈骗电子邮件注入演示，可端到端运行（在 Colab 中打开）。
  • example/langchain_memory.py — Veracium 作为 LangChain 聊天应用程序的长期存储层（会话密钥混合：LangChain 缓冲最近的回合，Veracium 保存具有出处和隔离的持久事实；现有的 LangChain 模型为双方提供支持）。
  • docs/concepts.md — 心理模型：边缘 vs 情节 vs 编译的 wiki、出处和作者身份、隔离、弃权门、生命周期。
  • docs/api.md — 公共 API：Memory、MemoryConfig、EvidenceAuthor，提供您自己的 LLM 可调用或存储。
  • docs/mcp.md — 运行并注册 MCP 服务器。
  • docs/design-rationale.md — 为什么没有 update()/delete()、没有 LLM-free 提取、没有 TTL 清除 — 以及路线图上真正的内容。
  • docs/telemetry.md — 选择加入、匿名、无内容的使用统计信息（默认关闭）。
  • docs/diagnostics.md — 选择加入错误报告：本地优先错误日志，同意 + 编辑发送。
  • ROADMAP.md · CHANGELOG.md

地位

经过验证的分层设计已实施、测试（44 个离线测试，加上选择加入的实时层：验收评估和真实语料库稳健性工具），并通过了自己的研究声明栏（5/5，0 注入断言）。 路线图 v0.1–v0.7 完整，加上选择加入遥测、自检、同意的错误报告和操作审核日志。 请参阅 ROADMAP.md。
